title: cornopteris decurrenti-alata
intro: Cornopteris decurrenti-alata, also known as the alpine maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cornopteris decurrenti-alata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cornopteris decurrenti-alata typically involve drying and processing the leaves into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
